---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement for TPT Kinetix
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that TPT Kinetix doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or API you'd like. If it's a new codec, note that the
repeatable process is documented in `docs/adding-a-codec.md`.

## Which crate(s) would this touch?

- [ ] tpt-kinetix-core
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-demux
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-mux
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-h264
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-av1
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-kg
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-pipeline
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-stream
- [ ] tpt-kinetix-cli

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, spec sections, etc.
